---
title: "Transformers"
---

## Attention Is All You Need

The transformer architecture was introduced by [Vaswani et al. (2017)](https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.03762). It replaced recurrence with a **self-attention** mechanism, enabling massive parallelization and leading to breakthrough results in NLP and beyond.

## Key Concepts

### Self-Attention

<!-- TODO: explain queries, keys, values and scaled dot-product attention -->

### Positional Encoding

<!-- TODO: explain why positional encoding is needed and how it works -->

### Encoder-Decoder Architecture

<!-- TODO: describe the full transformer architecture -->

## Resources

- [Attention Is All You Need (arXiv 1706.03762)](https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.03762)
- [Papers With Annotations](https://papers.baulab.info/)
- [The Illustrated Transformer — Jay Alammar](https://jalammar.github.io/illustrated-transformer/)
